title: Oil Holds Gains, Bonds Drop on Inflation Concerns: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 油价上涨，债券因通胀担忧而下跌：市场总结
summary: Oil held near its highest close since mid-June, weighing on stocks and Treasuries, as an escalation in Middle East hostilities rekindled worries about inflation.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
title_cn: 7 月 20 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil held a two-day gain as the US and Iran continued hostilities in the Middle East, while Yemen’s Houthi militants threatened to blockade Saudi Arabia’s maritime traffic in the Red Sea.

title: New Zealand Inflation Accelerates to 4.1% as Fuel Costs Soar
title_cn: 由于燃料成本飙升，新西兰通胀率加速至 4.1%
summary: New Zealand’s annual inflation accelerated to the fastest pace in more than two years in the second quarter, fanned by soaring fuel prices and reinforcing the Reserve Bank’s decision to begin raising interest rates.

title: Kioxia Bulls Ride Out Volatility With Targets 130% Above Market
title_cn: Kioxia 多头安然度过波动，目标高出市场 130%
summary: Analysts are maintaining bullish views on Kioxia Holdings Inc. despite a deepening share price correction, saying the stock is likely to resume its upward trajectory once supply-demand conditions improve.

title: LA’s $1.2 Billion ‘Graffiti Towers’ Cleared to Exit Bankruptcy
title_cn: 洛杉矶耗资12亿美元的“涂鸦塔”获准退出破产
summary: The bankrupt $1.2 billion Oceanwide Plaza project in Los Angeles, dubbed the Graffiti Towers after taggers spray-painted the abandoned complex, has been cleared for sale and possible completion more than seven years after the original Chinese developer ran out of money.

title: Gilts Rattled on Andy Burnham’s First Day as Fiscal Fears Return
title_cn: 随着财政担忧卷土重来，安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 上任第一天，英国国债就出现了动荡
summary: UK government bonds dropped after new Prime Minister Andy Burnham unnerved investors on his first day in the job over his approach to the country’s finances.

title: Netflix Taps US High-Grade Bond Market With $1 Billion Debt Sale
title_cn: Netflix 进军美国高等级债券市场 出售 10 亿美元债券
summary: Netflix Inc. raised $1 billion from a US high-grade bond sale on Monday, its first since a debut deal two years ago, as slowing sales growth fuels investor scrutiny of the company’s future.

title: Latin America Outperforms as Emerging Market Currencies Gain
title_cn: 随着新兴市场货币上涨，拉丁美洲表现优于大市
summary: Emerging-market currencies gained to start the week, with Latin American names getting a boost from a drop in volatility which further boosts their carry appeal.

title: Goldman Sells $2.5 Billion Preferreds Following Spread Low
title_cn: 高盛在价差低位后出售 25 亿美元优先股
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. priced new preferred shares Monday, just days after a metric determining risk and value in these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis.

title: S&P Slips as Apple, Tesla Keep Broader Chipmaker Gains in Check
title_cn: 苹果、特斯拉抑制更广泛芯片制造商的涨幅，标普指数下跌
summary: The S&P 500 Index erased early gains to finish lower as a decline in Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc. offset advances elsewhere. Chipmakers rebounded ahead of a deluge of earnings reports that will test whether Big Tech’s profits can match high expectations.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
title_cn: 7 月 20 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil edged up in a fraught session as traders grappled with a barrage of headlines that suggest a worsening of the Middle East conflict, as well as attempts to bring about a pause in the war.

title: Stocks, Bonds Fall as US-Iran Risks Whipsaw Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗风险打击石油，股市和债券下跌：市场结束
summary: A renewed bout of oil volatility sent stocks lower, with concerns about an escalation in Middle East hostilities outweighing attempts to bring about a pause in the war.

title: DoubleLine Says Higher Bond Yields to Help Fed Keep Rates Steady
title_cn: DoubleLine表示更高的债券收益率有助于美联储保持利率稳定
summary: DoubleLine is positioning in shorter-dated government bonds on the view that Kevin Warsh’s credibility with investors will help allow Federal Reserve officials to keep interest rates steady this year.

title: DC Readies $1.2 Billion Bond Sale as Credit Stabilizes Post-DOGE
title_cn: 随着 DOGE 后信用稳定，DC 准备出售 12 亿美元债券
summary: Washington, DC is stepping up to borrow $1.2 billion this week at its annual municipal debt sale, tapping the market as its credit stabilizes.

title: Canada Financials Stocks Close In on Top Spot as Energy Momentum Fades
title_cn: 随着能源动力减弱，加拿大金融股逼近榜首
summary: Canada’s financial stocks took a breather Monday after a torrid four-month rally that put them on the verge of overtaking energy as the best performing sector in the equity market this year.

title: Gold Steadies as Traders Assess Rate Path Amid US-Iran Conflict
title_cn: 交易员评估美伊冲突期间的利率走势，金价持稳
summary: Gold steadied after escalating US-Iran clashes over the weekend were followed by reports of mediation efforts, with traders assessing the likelihood of the Federal Reserve raising interest rates to contain inflation.

title: Lionheart (CUB) Nears $400 Million Deal for Venezuela Oil Stake
title_cn: Lionheart (CUB) 接近以 4 亿美元收购委内瑞拉石油股份
summary: Lionheart Capital is close to a $400 million deal for a stake in a Venezuelan oil field, in what would be one of the first major private investments in the country’s oil industry since the US began easing sanctions.

title: US Immigration Policies Sink Mexican Grocery Chain Chedraui
title_cn: 美国移民政策导致墨西哥杂货连锁店 Chedraui 陷入困境
summary: President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown is causing the worst rout on the Mexican stock exchange this year.

title: Money Funds Keep Cash Closer as Fed Leaves Markets Guessing
title_cn: 美联储让市场猜测，货币基金让现金更加接近
summary: Money‑market funds are shifting toward ultra short-term holdings and away from assets with even modest interest-rate risk as uncertainty grows over the Federal Reserve’s policy path and the near-term outlook for rates.

title: BlackRock Eyes More Than $12 Billion Debt for Data Center
title_cn: 贝莱德预计数据中心债务将超过 120 亿美元
summary: BlackRock Inc. is looking to sell more than $12 billion of bonds to help finance a Meta Platforms Inc. data center campus in El Paso, Texas, according to people with knowledge of the transaction, the latest in a string of debt deals fueling tech companies’ massive investments in artificial intelligence.

title: Burnham Picks Narayan as First UK AI Minister to Attend Cabinet
title_cn: 伯纳姆选择纳拉扬为第一位出席内阁的英国人工智能部长
summary: New British premier Andy Burnham has named Kanishka Narayan as minister for artificial intelligence, promoting the role to attend the prime minister’s cabinet for the first time.

title: Oracle Credit Risk Hits Near 18-Year High on AI Debt Load Angst
title_cn: 由于人工智能债务负担焦虑，甲骨文信用风险触及近 18 年来的高点
summary: The cost of protecting Oracle Corp.’s debt against default reached a fresh multi-year high on Monday while its existing bonds sold off, as doubts grew over whether the company’s massive investments in artificial intelligence will pay off.

title: BlackRock’s Meta Deal to Show the Power of $25 Billion M&A Spree
title_cn: 贝莱德的 Meta 交易展现了 250 亿美元并购热潮的力量
summary: For Larry Fink, BlackRock Inc.’s more than $12 billion debt sale for a Meta Platforms Inc. data center is the result of years spent transforming a public investments giant into a heavy hitter in private markets too.

title: UBS Trading Desk Says Buy Momentum Stocks as Selloff Nears End
title_cn: 瑞银交易部门表示，随着抛售接近尾声，买入动量股
summary: The sharp selloff in momentum stocks may be nearing its end, creating an opportunity for investors to start rebuilding positions in artificial intelligence and semiconductor shares, according to UBS’ trading desk.

title: Snap Nears Settlement of Addiction Case Ahead of Jury Trial
title_cn: Snap 成瘾案即将在陪审团审判前达成和解
summary: Snap Inc. said it has reached a tentative agreement to settle the second case set for trial over claims that the world’s largest social media platforms are addictive to minors, leaving only Meta Platforms Inc. to face a jury starting next week in Los Angeles.

title: Andreessen Horowtiz Hires Army Vet to American Dynamism Team
title_cn: 安德森·霍洛维茨 (Andreessen Horowtiz) 聘请陆军退伍军人加入美国活力团队
summary: Giant venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz has hired defense and space technology investor Connor Love, adding a military veteran and prominent VC to a team focused on startups critical to US interests.

title: Alibaba Fined Record €550 Million by EU for Illegal Sales
title_cn: 阿里巴巴因非法销售被欧盟处以创纪录的 5.5 亿欧元罚款
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd.’s e-commerce service was fined €550 million ($629 million) by the European Union for selling illegal products in the largest penalty under the bloc’s content moderation rulebook.

title: Google Shares Gain on Report of Chip to Boost AI Efficiency
title_cn: 谷歌股价因芯片提升人工智能效率的报告而上涨
summary: Shares of Google owner Alphabet Inc. gained on a report that the company is developing a server chip designed to optimize its Gemini artificial intelligence model.

title: Z.AI Completes Giant Data Center With Chinese Chips to Train AI
title_cn: Z.AI用中国芯片建成巨型数据中心来训练人工智能
summary: Z.AI has completed construction of a giant data center that houses only Chinese-made chips, a big step in Beijing’s efforts to replace restricted Nvidia Corp. silicon for future AI development.

title: Chinese AI Sensation Moonshot’s Gamble on Big Models Pays Off
title_cn: 中国AI Sensation Moonshot对大模型的赌博获得了回报
summary: Crowds rushed to an obscure corner of China’s premier tech summit, moving past monumental booths from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and Tencent Holdings Ltd. to catch a glimpse of the hottest name in domestic AI.

title: Moonshot’s Kimi AI Model Sets Off Anxiety in the US
title_cn: Moonshot 的 Kimi AI 模型在美国引发焦虑
summary: Moonshot’s release of Kimi K3 sparked fierce debate in the US

title: Moonshot AI’s Kimi K3 Stuns Investors, Challenges Anthropic, OpenAI Lead
title_cn: Moonshot AI 的 Kimi K3 令投资者震惊，挑战 Anthropic、OpenAI 领导者
summary: Moonshot’s release is forcing Silicon Valley to reconsider long-held assumptions

title: ChatGPT, Claude Infiltrate Dating Apps by Helping Singles Flirt With Matches
title_cn: ChatGPT、Claude 通过帮助单身人士与火柴人调情渗透到约会应用程序中
summary: Singles are outsourcing chats to ChatGPT and Claude, complicating how romantic connections begin

title: Influencers Are Being Paid to Spread the Mormon Church's Gospel
title_cn: 有影响力的人接受报酬来传播摩门教的福音
summary: Through its for-profit subsidiary, the church owns several advertising companies with influencer-marketing arms

title: Moonshot’s Kimi K3 May Be More About Memory Than Compute
title_cn: Moonshot 的 Kimi K3 可能更注重内存而不是计算
summary: When DeepSeek’s R1 debuted in early 2025, almost $600 billion was wiped out from Nvidia Corp.’s market value in a single day on fears that artificial intelligence would require less computing power than previously expected. Moonshot AI’s release of Kimi K3 on Friday triggered a similar reaction, helping push semiconductor stocks sharply lower.

title: Chinese Stocks Rebound After National Team Support Resurfaces
title_cn: 国家队支持重新出现后中国股市反弹
summary: Chinese shares rose after a choppy session, amid signs of late buying by state funds as authorities intensified efforts to salvage a slumping market.

title: Moonshot Is Creating New Winners and Losers in the AI Trade
title_cn: Moonshot 正在人工智能行业创造新的赢家和输家
summary: Moonshot AI’s surprise release of a new artificial intelligence model has sent a jolt through markets, forcing investors to reassess some of the biggest assumptions behind the global tech rally.

title: AI Is ‘New Engine’ Keeping Chinese Economy From Harder Landing
title_cn: 人工智能是中国经济避免硬着陆的“新引擎”
summary: A global rush to build out artificial intelligence infrastructure has turned the technology into a key pocket of growth in China’s economy during one of its weakest stretches in years.

title: Prysmian Signs $6.3 Billion Molex Deal for Data-Center Gear
title_cn: Prysmian 与 Molex 签署价值 63 亿美元的数据中心设备交易
summary: Prysmian SpA signed a deal worth as much €5.5 billion ($6.3 billion) to supply Koch Inc.’s Molex with optical cables for its data centers, tapping into the artificial-intelligence build-out.

title: Can Kimi K3 Help China Beat US for AI Dominance?: Live Q&A
title_cn: Kimi K3能否帮助中国击败美国取得人工智能主导地位？：现场问答
summary: Bloomberg reporters answer your questions on China’s push to lead the AI race on July 20 at 3 p.m. HKT / 8 a.m. BST

title: Andy Burnham Names John Healey Chancellor in Surprise UK Cabinet Move
title_cn: 安迪·伯纳姆 (Andy Burnham) 任命约翰·希利 (John Healey) 为财政大臣，英国内阁变动令人惊讶
summary: Andy Burnham named former Defense Secretary John Healey to be his Chancellor of the Exchequer in a surprise move by the UK’s new prime minister that fueled speculation about a bigger increase in military spending.

title: Healey, Haigh, Mahmood: Who’s Who in Burnham’s New UK Cabinet
title_cn: 希利、黑格、马哈茂德：伯纳姆新英国内阁的名人录
summary: Delivering his first speech as UK prime minister in front of the famous black door of 10 Downing Street, Andy Burnham promised to bring forward “the biggest changes in the last 40 years” for Britain. Those changes started with his cabinet.

title: US Vows Fresh 50% Tariff on Canada as New Trade War Looms
title_cn: 随着新贸易战的临近，美国誓言对加拿大征收新的 50% 关税
summary: The Trump administration vowed to impose a fresh 50% tariff on some Canadian goods over what it said was unfair treatment of American alcohol, cars and dairy, further inflaming trade tensions between the two neighbors.

title: DOJ Probes Harvard Financial Aid, Alleging China Donor Influence
title_cn: 美国司法部调查哈佛财政援助，指控中国捐助者的影响
summary: The US Justice Department said Monday it has launched a new investigation into Harvard University, alleging that some of its financial aid programs violate civil rights law by excluding American citizens.

title: Saudi-Led Coalition in Yemen Vows to Protect Ships From Houthis
title_cn: 沙特领导的也门联军誓言保护船只免受胡塞武装袭击
summary: The Houthis, an Iran-backed Yemeni group, vowed to impose a maritime blockade on Saudi Arabia, prompting the military coalition in Yemen that’s led by the kingdom to say it had taken steps to protect vessels sailing the Red Sea.

title: Ukraine Company Fields New Long-Range Weapon Aimed at Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰公司部署针对俄罗斯的新型远程武器
summary: SkyFall, the Ukrainian defense technology company, has developed a long-range strike weapon that is being tested in operations against Russia, as Kyiv steps up a campaign that has caused severe logistical problems for Moscow.

title: Trump Says Iran Will Pay for Deaths as Mediators Push Truce
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗将为调解者推动停战造成的死亡付出代价
summary: US forces struck Iranian targets after President Donald Trump vowed Tehran “will pay” for killing three US soldiers, even as mediators proposed a new truce with the Middle East war widening further.

title: Victims of Past Terrorism Urge US Not to Release Iranian Funds
title_cn: 过去恐怖主义的受害者敦促美国不要释放伊朗资金
summary: Groups representing victims of Iranian-linked terrorism urged the US not to release any money to Tehran, underscoring the political risks for President Donald Trump of fulfilling a key demand under a possible peace deal.

title: US Offers to Halve Aluminum Duties for Firms Building in US
title_cn: 美国提议将在美建设企业的铝关税减半
summary: The Trump administration announced an incentive program under which companies that build, expand or refurbish aluminum plants in the US would receive a tariff discount for the metal they ship into the country from abroad.

title: Burnham’s Pricey Pledges Leave Open Question of How to Fund Them
title_cn: 伯纳姆的昂贵承诺留下了如何为其提供资金的悬而未决的问题
summary: Addressing the nation as its new prime minister on Monday, Andy Burnham pledged his first action would be to secure people “breathing space” with the cost of living.

title: How Houthis’ Red Sea Threat Risks Bigger Oil Shock
title_cn: 胡塞武装的红海威胁如何引发更大的石油危机
summary: One thing that’s helped limit the Iran war’s disruption to global oil supply is the ability of Saudi Arabia to use an alternative export route to the Strait of Hormuz: the Red Sea.

title: Trump Says Netanyahu Won’t Be Arrested After Mamdani Threat
title_cn: 特朗普称内塔尼亚胡不会在马姆达尼威胁后被捕
summary: President Donald Trump said Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu “will not be arrested” in the US, rebuffing New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani’s suggestion that such an apprehension could happen.

title: Maine Power Play Sets Stage for Competitive Senate Ballot
title_cn: 缅因州权力游戏为竞争性参议院投票奠定了基础
summary: Democrats are picking their candidate to face the Republican incumbent in a far more orderly fashion than many had anticipated.

title: Darline Graham Says She’s Running for South Carolina Senate
title_cn: 达琳·格雷厄姆说她正在竞选南卡罗来纳州参议员
summary: Republican Senator Darline Graham said she plans to run in November’s midterm elections for the seat held by her late brother, Lindsey Graham.

title: Trump Signs Order to Map Supply Chains for National Security
title_cn: 特朗普签署命令绘制国家安全供应链图
summary: US defense contractors will have to map out critical supply chains to identify sources in adversary countries under a new White House order signed Monday.

title: El Mayo Gets Life in Jail Over Role in Drug Cartel, Murders
title_cn: 埃尔梅奥因参与贩毒集团和谋杀而被判终身监禁
summary: Mexican drug lord Ismael “El Mayo” Zambada Garcia was sentenced to life in prison for his role in running the violent Sinaloa cartel, ordering the murder of scores of people and importing massive amounts of cocaine, fentanyl and heroin into the US.

title: Burnham to Seek ‘Flexibility’ Within Existing Fiscal Rules
title_cn: 伯纳姆将在现有财政规则中寻求“灵活性”
summary: Britain’s new prime minister, Andy Burnham, said he would use “flexibility” within the UK’s fiscal rules and push borrowing closer to the limits of what investors will tolerate as he seeks to reboot the slow-growing economy.

title: Hungarian Chess Champion Polgar Turns Down Presidency Offer
title_cn: 匈牙利国际象棋冠军波尔加拒绝担任总统
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar suffered his first major setback since taking office after chess legend Judit Polgar declined to be nominated as president just a day after he had publicly endorsed her.

title: Trump Suits Reach Key Stages After Pair of Recent Setbacks
title_cn: 在最近的两次挫折之后，特朗普诉讼达到了关键阶段
summary: Lawyers for President Donald Trump and his sprawling business interests are heading to court this week in Florida for high-stakes hearings that follow a pair of major setbacks in their wave of multibillion-dollar lawsuits.

title: Congressman Russell Fry Enters Senate Race to Replace Graham
title_cn: 国会议员拉塞尔·弗莱参加参议院竞选以取代格雷厄姆
summary: Rep. Russell Fry (R-S.C.) announced Monday he will run for the open Senate seat left vacant by the late Sen. Lindsey Graham, who died July 11.
